name: Miso Soup
recipeIngredient: (or make it fresh, see next message)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil water.
2. Add Dashi to the boiling water and stir until dissolved.
3. Add vegetable of choice (fresh daikon slices, tofu, wakame soaked for 15 minutes, mushrooms, spinach or similar) and cook for 1 minute.
4. Turn off heat.
5. Stir in Miso in small amounts.
6. Garnish with freshly shredded scallion.
7. Serve.
